name: zinput_mouse_update_acquire_state
description: zInput::Mouse_UpdateAcquireState acquires or unacquires the DirectInput mouse device and flips active state only on real failures.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zinput_mouse_update_acquire_state failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 54 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 74, VC object size 80, 5 trailing VC NOPs trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zinput_mouse_update_acquire_state/verify/470310_byte_triage.txt.

The reviewed byte drift is global-load and branch scheduling shape around g_zInput_MouseActive and g_zInput_MouseDevice; the native smoke covers acquire, unacquire, and failure-triggered active-state flips.
